name: Waffles and Chicken

ingredients.item: Sriracha hot sauce, maple syrup, or honey for serving

method: In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, baking powder, sugar, and salt.
Stir in the cinnamon, eggs, milk, vanilla, and vegetable oil. Whisk until well-combined.
Preheat a waffle iron. Add the batter to the iron. Cook until done, about 5-7 minutes. Set the waffles aside on a plate.
To make the buttermilk brine, in a large mixing bowl, combine the buttermilk, onion powder, garlic powder, chili powder, salt, and smoked paprika.
Stir in the chicken thighs. Let it marinate at room temperature for 30 minutes.
Meanwhile, in a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, onion powder, garlic powder, salt, pepper, cornstarch, and baking powder.
Drain the chicken thighs from the buttermilk brine. Coat in the seasoned flour mixture.
Heat the oil in a large non-stick frying pan over medium heat. Deep-fry the chicken until crispy, about 10 minutes.
Serve the waffles with the crispy fried chicken on top. Drizzle with the sriracha sauce, maple syrup, or honey.
